Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.reason: All three summary points are directly supported by the Results.

Core_Validation_Method.reason: Differential expression analysis, cloning, heterologous expression, in vitro assay, HPLC/LC-MS/NMR, and yeast pathway reconstruction are all described.

Other_Important_Info.reason: The paper states this is a newly identified enzyme for ECH production and gives 64.88% similarity to a P. japonicum scopoletin glucosyltransferase.

Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu.reason: CdUGT is the high-value terminal enzyme enabling pathway completion in microbial production systems.

Omics_Data.reason: Transcriptomics/metabolomics and NGDC accession PRJCA041348 are explicitly reported.
